concepts.finding: Faster R-CNN introduces Region Proposal Network (RPN) that shares full-image convolutional features with the detection network, making region proposals nearly cost-free and enabling real-time detection.
concepts.implication: Attention-like mechanism (RPN) that shares computation with the main network is highly efficient. For search, this suggests shared encoders for both retrieval and ranking stages.
concepts.open_question: Can a shared-encoder architecture for retrieval and ranking in search approach the efficiency gains seen in Faster R-CNN?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A shared-encoder two-tower model for search retrieval and ranking will reduce total computation by 40%+ compared to separate models.
